nasb.text: Then the mother of the sons of Zebedee came to Jesus with her sons, bowing down and making a request of Him.

esv.text: Then the mother of the sons of Zebedee came up to him with her sons, and kneeling before him she asked him for something.

cnv.text: 那時，西庇太的兒子的母親，帶著她的兩個兒子前來見耶穌。她跪在耶穌面前求他。

ccb.text: 当时，西庇太的妻子带着两个儿子上前，跪在耶稣面前，有事要求祂。

csbs.text: 那时，西庇太儿子的母亲带着她的两个儿子上前来拜耶稣，向他求一件事。
